title: npmx Community Sparks Engagement and Connection

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: The @npmx.dev community is actively engaging with members and attendees at various events, showcasing a strong sense of camaraderie and collaboration. Participants express their appreciation for the community and the connections made during meetups and conferences.

topics.title: Meetups and Conferences
topics.summary: Recent meetups and conferences, such as @localfirstconf.com, have provided opportunities for networking and collaboration among developers. Participants share their experiences and highlight the importance of these gatherings in fostering community spirit and innovation.

topics.title: Personal Connections
topics.summary: Participants express their admiration for fellow developers and the personal connections formed during events. The joy of meeting idols and influential figures in the tech community is a recurring theme, emphasizing the human aspect of technology.
